verses.1: Blessed be the LORD, my rock,
verses.3: LORD, what is man, that you care for him?
verses.5: Part your heavens, LORD, and come down.
verses.6: Throw out lightning, and scatter them.
verses.7: Stretch out your hand from above,
verses.9: I will sing a new song to you, God.
verses.10: You are he who gives salvation to kings,
verses.11: Rescue me, and deliver me out of the hands of foreigners,
verses.12: Then our sons will be like well-nurtured plants,
verses.13: Our barns are full, filled with all kinds of provision.
verses.14: Our oxen will pull heavy loads.
verses.15: Happy are the people who are in such a situation.
